runners.formComment: Won again and recorded an impressive time after racing on speed to make it two on end at this track over 457m (25.77). Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

runners.formComment: Placed last time (21.19) at this track in a Class 4, finishing second and beaten a head. Has six wins and 11 placings from 22 starts from the draw. Looks to have turned things around so follow him up.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by a nose in 25.92, beating Go Cooper. Last start finished 4th in a Class 4/5 on April 9 over 457m at this track behind Our Erin beaten 3.5 lengths (25.90). Has ability and looks a winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Awkwardly in to bend placed in restricted room and lost ground.
